name: TEST - Total Amount Less Than Subtotal (Tax Invoice) (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.document_type) and field.document_type == 'tax_invoice'
  and not is_empty(field.amount_total)
  and not is_empty(field.amount_total_base)
  and field.amount_total < field.amount_total_base
)

payload.content: Total Amount must be greater than Subtotal.
Total Amount must be greater than Subtotal.
